offer: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed lease renewal deadlines cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated lease management alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on lease management tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try lease tracking dashboard with 1-3 leases
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for renewals
Allow CSV import for existing lease data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
